summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of redesigned Client and Developer dashboards with new blue theme. Successfully verified removal of purple colors from Builder Auth and implementation of consistent blue design across all components.
passed_tests: Homepage loads with blue theme elements
Builder Auth page successfully redesigned with blue theme (purple removed)
Client Auth page uses blue color scheme
Demo login functionality works for both Developer and Client roles
Developer Dashboard loads with new design (sidebar + stats + workspace)
Client Dashboard loads with new design (sidebar + stats + active projects)
Blue gradient logos display correctly in both dashboards
Sidebar navigation works in both Client and Developer cabinets
New Request button visible and clickable in Client Dashboard sidebar
Stat cards display properly in both dashboards
Empty states show correctly for no active tasks/projects
Navigation between dashboard sections works smoothly
Background glow effects and gradients render correctly
